verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When we give the Lord our heart, He deserves every part; But very often we hold back some things, We should have given from the start;

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I just want to be His Bride, There is nothing to hide; Every corner of my life I give, To let Him rule and let Him live.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm gonna treat Him like a King, Make Him Lord of everything; All the honor I can bring, I'm gonna treat Him like a King.

verse.name: v4
v5
verse.lines: He is free to rule and reign, My heart is His domain; While the world is praising other things, I wanna crown Him King of kings.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: All the honor I can bring, He's the only song I sing, Oh, let the anthem ring, I'm gonna treat Him like a King!
